requirements: Replace MacWhisper with direct Whisper CLI integration
Update config file to support whisper CLI parameters
Make sure WHISPER_CLI_PARAMS in config is used in transcribe_video.sh
Update the whisper command calls to use the proper CLI syntax

output_examples.name: Whisper CLI Command Example
output_examples.description: Example command for using Whisper CLI
output_examples.content:
# Example of proper Whisper CLI usage

# Configuration
WHISPER_CLI_PATH="whisper"
WHISPER_MODEL="medium"
WHISPER_CLI_PARAMS="--language English --model ${WHISPER_MODEL}"

# Usage in script
run_transcription() {
  local input_file="$1"
  local output_dir="$2"
  
  # Build arguments array
  local args=("${input_file}")
  
  # Add parameters from config
  for param in $WHISPER_CLI_PARAMS; do
    args+=("$param")
  done
  
  # Add output directory if specified
  if [ -n "${output_dir}" ]; then
    args+=("--output_dir" "${output_dir}")
  fi
  
  # Run whisper with all parameters
  ${WHISPER_CLI_PATH} "${args[@]}"
}
